headlines.headline: Plevik Energy CFO steps down unexpectedly citing personal reasons

headlines.headline: Zrovov Advisors announces $7.9B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program is a strong signal of management confidence and provides direct support to the stock price.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
